name: 24" x 36" Infinity Mantle Mirror Brass - Threshold™: Rust-Resistant, Wall Mount, Modern Decor
description:
Upgrade the look of your space with this Infinity Mantle Mirror from Threshold™. This mantle mirror features a rectangular shape with a rounded top for a clean, modern look. Set in a rust-resistant brass frame, it adds a touch of shine to your decor. Hang it above a console table, fireplace mantel or dresser for versatile, functional and elegant display.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
